title: Dead Channel Protocol

difficulty.label: Advanced
difficulty.reason: High branch density and pressure decisions demand experienced play.

recommendations: Regenerate voice profile assets so each character has full design metadata (speed, pitch, texture, EQ).

issues: Message flood risk: average message count per beat is high and may overwhelm novice players.
recommendations: Increase in-beat delay spread and gate lower-priority messages behind response selections.
1 optional-tone endings are currently rare; keep as stretch outcomes or tune branch balance if desired.
Regenerate voice profile assets so each character has full design metadata (speed, pitch, texture, EQ).
Run human playtest on mobile with the novice script to verify readability and pacing under real interruption patterns.
